title: lathyrus rotundifolius subsp. miniatus
intro: Lathyrus rotundifolius subsp. miniatus, also known as the dwarf pea or miniature flat-pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight bacterial infections due to the presence of certain alkaloids. The health benefits of Lathyrus rotundifolius subsp. miniatus include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
